Module System.M

  • Parameters
  • Signature

Parameters

module StateM : State.StateM.S

Signature

val tlv_atexit : fun_exec:(Common.Fun_kind.t -> 'a Svalue.Typed.t list -> ('b, unit) StateM.t) -> 'a Svalue.Typed.t list -> ([> Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.T.tuple ] Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.t, 'c) StateM.t

Used on macOS to register thread local destructors; receives a function pointer and an argument. Should call the destructor with the argument at the end of the thread.

_tlv_atexit(dtor: unsafe extern "C" fn( *mut u8), arg: *mut u8)

val cxa_thread_atexit_impl : fun_sig:Charon.Types.fun_sig -> 'a -> ([> Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.T.enum ] Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.t, 'b) StateM.t

__cxa_thread_atexit_impl: Option<extern "C" fn(...)> is a weak symbol we don't link against, so it reads as None; the destructor registration then takes its fallback (`register_dtor_fallback`) path.

val dso_handle : 'a -> ([> Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.T.sptr_f ] Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.t, 'b) StateM.t

__dso_handle: *mut u8 is likewise an unlinked weak symbol, i.e. null.

val pthread_key_create : fun_sig:Charon.Types.fun_sig -> fun_exec: (Common.Fun_kind.t -> [> Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.T.sptr_f ] Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.t list -> ('a, unit) StateM.t) -> [< Svalue.Typed.T.any ] Svalue.Typed.t list -> ([> Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.T.sint ] Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.t, 'b) StateM.t

pthread_key_create takes a key out-pointer and an optional destructor. We don't model pthread TLS storage, so any non-sentinel key works; std asserts the created key isn't KEY_SENTVAL (0), so we write 1. The key's destructor (which ignores its argument and just drains the thread-local destructor list) is registered to run at thread exit.

val pthread_key_noop : 'a -> ([> Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.T.sint ] Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.t, 'b) StateM.t

pthread_setspecific/pthread_key_delete only manage the (unmodelled) TLS storage and marker; returning success is enough.

val fn_to_stub : Charon.Types.fun_sig -> (Common.Fun_kind.t -> ([< Svalue.Typed.T.any FullPtr ] as 'a) Svalue.Typed.t list -> ('b, unit) StateM.t) -> fn -> 'a Svalue.Typed.t list -> ([> `Enum | `FullPtr | `NonZero | `Tuple | `Zero ] Soteria_rust_lib__Svalue__Typed.t, 'c) StateM.t
